title: Contribution workflow + reviewer rotation + PR template enforcing gates
context: With schema, vocabulary, tooling, and gates defined, the project needs a documented contribution workflow so that external contributors can submit protocols correctly and reviewers can process them efficiently. The workflow must enforce the non-skippable gates (license+ethics, safety sign-off) through a PR template and document reviewer rotation, escalation paths, and the Sev-1 errata process for safety errors in shipped protocols. Depends on gate-003 (gates to enforce) and reviewer-002 (safety sign-off role to reference).
objective: Design and publish the contribution workflow covering the full submission-to-ship pipeline, a GitHub PR template that enforces all gates, reviewer rotation and escalation documentation, and the Sev-1 errata process for post-publication safety issues.
acceptanceCriteria: PR template requires checklist confirming: schema-valid, linter-green, license+ethics evidence recorded, dual-use screen clear, and required reviewer sign-offs (technical + safety, +domain where applicable).
Contribution workflow document describes the full pipeline from candidate protocol to shipped status, referencing each gate and tool.
Reviewer rotation and escalation documented: who holds technical, safety, and domain reviewer roles; how to escalate when roles are vacant; safety sign-off marked non-skippable.
Sev-1 errata process documented: pull/flag protocol on safety error, fix, re-review, re-version, notify known adopters.
Document committed to repo; commit DCO signed-off.
output: Committed contribution workflow document, GitHub PR template (.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md), and reviewer rotation/errata documentation; commit DCO signed-off.
